TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Beji_Caid_Essebsi, title = Beji_Caid_Essebsi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Beji_Caid_Essebsi} }

S.FORM: = Beji Caid Essebsi = Mntucing hngkawas 1926 idas 11 jiyax 29 ka Beji Caid Essebsi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Tunisia ta sayang o kiya ka Beji Caid Essebsi, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 12 jiyax 31 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = bəɟi ʦaid əssəbsi = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka bəɟi ʦaid əssəbsi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan tunisia ta sajaŋ o kija ka bəɟi ʦaid əssəbsi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Beji Caid Essebsi = Mntucing hngkawas 1926 idas 11 jiyax 29 ka Beji Caid Essebsi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Tunisia ta sayang o kiya ka Beji Caid Essebsi, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 12 jiyax 31 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = bəɟi ʦaid əssəbsi = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka bəɟi ʦaid əssəbsi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan tunisia ta sajaŋ o kija ka bəɟi ʦaid əssəbsi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
